author: slava77
body:
backport of #51333

This is an interim measure to address the very extreme tail event(s) such as seen the phase-2 170pre2 relval QCD 2TeV jet events in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/51245#issuecomment-4808609161

See the full description in the master branch PR #51333

Unclear if this is really needed; providing for completeness (somewhat pre-emptively) in re to https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51334#issuecomment-4812879471
title: LST: set T5 occupancy threshold at 100K (backport of #51333)
